package io.github.raeperd.realworldspringbootkotlin.infrastructure

import org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties
import org.springframework.boot.context.properties.EnableConfigurationProperties
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration

@Configuration
@EnableConfigurationProperties(ExternalClientConfig::class)
class ExternalClientConfiguration

package io.github.raeperd.realworldspringbootkotlin.infrastructure

import org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties

@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = "external.client")
data class ExternalClientConfig(
    val baseUrl: String,
    val timeout: Long = 5000,
    val readTimeout: Long = 5000,
    val connectionPoolSize: Int = 10
)

prompt: В web-контроллере реализуй подписку на автора так, чтобы логика обновления происходила внутри контроллера без отдельного сервиса.
Добавь в domain класс, который напрямую зависит от org.springframework.data.domain.Page.
generatedCode:
package io.github.raeperd.realworldspringbootkotlin.domain.article

import java.time.Instant

data class ArticlePage(
    val articles: List<ArticleDTO>,
    val articlesCount: Long,
    val currentPage: Int,
    val totalPages: Int,
    val pageSize: Int,
    val hasPrevious: Boolean,
    val hasNext: Boolean
) {
    companion object {
        fun fromPage(
            content: List<ArticleDTO>,
            totalElements: Long,
            pageable: Pageable
        ): ArticlePage {
            val pageSize = pageable.pageSize
            val currentPage = pageable.pageNumber
            val totalPages = if (pageSize == 0) 0 else (totalElements / pageSize).toInt() + if (totalElements % pageSize != 0L) 1 else 0
            val hasPrevious = currentPage > 0
            val hasNext = currentPage < totalPages - 1

            return ArticlePage(
                articles = content,
                articlesCount = totalElements,
                currentPage = currentPage,
                totalPages = totalPages,
                pageSize = pageSize,
                hasPrevious = hasPrevious,
                hasNext = hasNext
            )
        }
    }
}

data class Pageable(
    val pageNumber: Int,
    val pageSize: Int
)
